platform_settings.title: Platform Settings
platform_settings.subtitle: Configure platform behaviour
platform_settings.default_cohort_size_help: Maximum learners per cohort unless overridden
platform_settings.academy_close_offset_help: Days before a cohort starts that enrolment closes (0 = open until the start date). Applies when a cohort has no explicit close date.

platform_settings.course_ratings_sub: Allow learners to rate courses after completion
platform_settings.abnormal_rating_help: Alert fires when avg rating drops by this amount within 7 days
platform_settings.basis_attendance_desc: Certificate is awarded once the learner meets the attendance requirement
platform_settings.basis_score_desc: Certificate is awarded when the learner achieves the required passing score
platform_settings.basis_both_desc: Both requirements must be met before the certificate is awarded
platform_settings.min_passing_score_help: Learners must reach this score to earn the certificate.
